_comment: Illustrative LLM output. Actual ranking and phrasing will vary.

clusters.theme: Compliance, RBAC, SSO, and audit capabilities for enterprise deals
Different task views (calendar, kanban, Gantt) for different working styles
Connecting to CRM, Slack, and Teams for enterprise workflows
Bulk export, templates, time tracking, recurring tasks — power-user table stakes
Offline, guest access, digest emails, AI helpers

top_10_ranked.title: Role-based access control
top_10_ranked.rationale: Enterprise must-have from sales team. Blocks enterprise deals. 210 votes, all from high-value segment.

top_10_ranked.title: SSO (SAML / Google Workspace)
top_10_ranked.rationale: Pairs with RBAC for enterprise security story. Common security checklist item. 178 votes from sales.

top_10_ranked.title: Kanban board view
top_10_ranked.rationale: Highest single-request vote count (344). Broad SMB appeal. High visibility — missing this is a dealbreaker for some users.

top_10_ranked.title: Recurring task support
top_10_ranked.rationale: 287 votes. Fundamental productivity feature. High reach, relatively low effort.

top_10_ranked.title: Calendar view for tasks
top_10_ranked.rationale: 255 votes. Complements kanban view. Expected by most project management tool users.

top_10_ranked.title: Bulk export to CSV
top_10_ranked.rationale: 142 votes from enterprise. Data portability is increasingly a procurement requirement. Lower effort.

top_10_ranked.title: Gantt chart view
top_10_ranked.rationale: 167 votes, strong mid-market signal. Signals PM and project lead use cases.

top_10_ranked.title: Microsoft Teams integration
top_10_ranked.rationale: 134 votes from sales. Enterprise customers heavily in Microsoft ecosystem. Unlock blocked deals.

top_10_ranked.title: Data retention and audit log for compliance
top_10_ranked.rationale: 88 votes from legal team — a compliance unlock for regulated industries. Multiplier for enterprise deals.

top_10_ranked.title: Time tracking built-in
top_10_ranked.rationale: 198 votes. High SMB desire but watch for scope: full time tracking is medium-large effort.

quick_wins: FR001: Bulk CSV export — 142 votes, likely low engineering effort, immediate enterprise value
FR015: Email digest of overdue items — 93 votes, simple notification logic, high engagement improvement
defer: FR003: Dark mode — 321 votes but pure UI polish, no enterprise value, high CSS effort
FR019: AI task description generator — 44 votes, experimental, low confidence in demand
